title: No More Uncraftables
description: This mod adds crafting recipes for uncraftable items like the Saddle, Totem of Undying, and Elytra!
body:
This mod allows you to craft previously uncraftable items! It introduces crafting recipes for:

- Saddle
- Elytra
- Totem of Undying
- Chainmail Armor
- All Horse Armors
- Name Tag
- Enchanted Golden Apple _(only in 1.1.0)_

With these additions, you can now craft essential items that were once only available through rare drops or special events. Perfect for survival players looking to enhance their experience without losing the challenge of crafting.
